title: Senior Software Engineer - Cognizant - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cognizant - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant:
Cognizant is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant!
